{{Infobox character
| name = Elder Rahm
| aliases = Rahm
| titles = {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|Elder, [[Heaven’s Glory Elder|Heaven's Glory elder]]}}
| professions = {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|keeper}}
| residence = {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Lesser Treasure Hall]]}}
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Unsouled (novel)|Unsouled]]
}}

''See also: [[Elder Rahm Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|Elder Rahm is an elder at the [[Heaven's Glory]] School who serves as the overseer for all three of the institution's Treasure Halls, including the [[Lesser Treasure Hall]]. Though he appears to be an elderly man of at least eighty years, he has been observed possessing the vitality of a much younger person. He is a mentor figure to disciples, advising them on how to select significant treasures that will support their long-term advancement. However, he is also characterized by a deep distrust of outsiders and can be quite stubborn and confrontational. Rahm has previously suffered a significant spiritual injury resulting from a conflict with a [[Sage]], an event that impacted his well-being. Despite his aged and hunched appearance, he is capable of wielding a slender [[sword]] with precision.}}

== Unsouled ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Elder Rahm]] has supervised the [[Elder Treasure Hall]] for forty years.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c14">''Unsouled'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Elder Rahm]] is a [[Heaven's Glory]] elder who forged the cases in the [[Lesser Treasure Hall]] and possesses countermeasures for broken cases.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c18">''Unsouled'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Elder Rahm]] has constructs hovering over each shoulder and a weapon in hand.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c18" />}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|As a [[Jade]] and an Elder of the [[Heaven’s Glory School]], Rahm serves as the keeper of the [[Lesser Treasure Hall]], an area that was previously devastated by a past battle. During a confrontation where he stood behind [[Yerin]], he expressed pity for [[Lindon]] but issued a threat that his [[Remnant]] would take action should he be killed. Despite his status, Rahm maintains a defiant attitude and refuses to bow to [[Eithan]].}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Elder Rahm]] is the keeper of the [[Heaven’s Glory School]]’s [[Lesser Treasure Hall]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c6">''Bloodline'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Elder Rahm]] is a [[Jade]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Elder Rahm]] expressed pity for [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Elder Rahm]] threatened that his [[Remnant]] would act if he were killed.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Elder Rahm]] stood behind [[Yerin]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|Rahm is an Elder who previously had a battle that destroyed much of the interior of the [[Lesser Treasure Hall]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c7">''Bloodline'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Elder Rahm]] is an Elder.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c13">''Bloodline'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Elder Rahm]] refuses to bow to [[Eithan]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c13" />}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|“Perhaps I was right all along to pity you.”<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c6" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|“Liar!” Elder Rahm shouted from where he stood behind Yerin.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c6" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|"You�ve done a bad thing, Elder Rahm,� Eithan said as he slowly turned around.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c13" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
